runners.formComment: Quickly out of the boxes with a slick early sectional clocking 34.19 with a 2 length win at this track over 595m. Makes plenty of appeal. Go close again.

runners.formComment: Last start finished fourth in a Grade 4/5 on April 9 over 595m at this track behind Lochinvar Hummer, beaten 7 lengths (34.55). Tested under these conditions.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished fourth in a Grade 4/5 on April 9 over 595m at this track behind Lochinvar Hummer, beaten 7 lengths (34.55). Tested under these conditions.

runners.formComment: Big odds last time but hit the ground running with a strong early split, giving a sight but fading only late to finish third (34.49) at this track over 595m. Fought on last time. Right in the mix again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Big odds last time but hit the ground running with a strong early split, giving a sight but fading only late to finish third (34.49) at this track over 595m. Fought on last time. Right in the mix again.

runners.formComment: Won two starts back at this track over 515m in 29.86. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when seventh over 515m at this track at Grade 5 level. Others preferred.

formComments.title: TAB

runners.formComment: Has hit the frame the last couple. Finished second at this track latest but prior to that recorded a swift 29.56 over 515m finishing second at this track. Rates a top chance with a repeat here.

formComments.title: TAB

runners.formComment: Was out of placings last time (35.48) at The Meadows in a Grade 4/5, finishing fifth and beaten 7 lengths. Has one win and two placings from six starts from the draw. Can feature in the finish.
